zh.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook於1345年出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。她於1400年與Henry Sutton在英國諾廷加姆爾艾維哈姆 煙雨 凱爾哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年10月9日在英國享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook于1345年出生在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。她于1400年与Henry Sutton在英国諾廷加姆爾艾維哈姆 煙雨 凱爾哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年10月9日在英国享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holbrook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’, such as Holbrook (Derbyshire, Dorset, Suffolk) and Howbrook in Wortley (Yorkshire).
Americanized form of North German Halbrock (or some like-sounding surname), a cognate of 1 above.

History: This name was first taken to America by the brothers Thomas and John Holbrook, who emigrated to MA in the 17th century; their line can be traced back to Dundry, Somerset, England, in the first half of the 16th century. Other English bearers who started early lines of descent in the New World are Joseph Ho(u)lbrook of Warrington, Lancashire, who emigrated to MD as an indentured servant in the later 17th century; Randolph Holbrook, who was in VA in the 1720s but later returned to Nantwich, Cheshire; and Rev. John Holbrook, who emigrated from Handbury, Staffordshire, to NJ c. 1723.

variants.name: Holbrooks
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Holbrook , with excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Haulbrook
meanings: Altered form of English   Holbrook  , reflecting the southern US pronunciation of the name.

variants.name: Halbrook
meanings: English: variant of   Holbrook  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook was born in 1345, in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England. She married Henry Sutton in 1400, in Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 9 October 1410, in England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook est née en 1345, à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Sutton en 1400, à Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 octobre 1410, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook wurde 1345 in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England geboren. Sie hat 1400 in Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, England Henry Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Oktober 1410 im Alter von 65 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook è nata il nel 1345 nel Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England. Lei sposato Henry Sutton nel 1400, nel Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 ottobre 1410, nel England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrookは1345年にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブで生まれた。1400年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエイバーハム ウィス ケルハムでHenry Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年10月9日にイギリスで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook(은)는 1345년 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 노틴그함실르 에버함 위스 켈함에서 Henry Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 10월 9일 영국에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook nasceu em 1345, em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Sutton em 1400, em Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1410, em Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook родилась в 1345 г. в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sutton в 1400 г. в местности авирам вит келхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 октября 1410 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margeria Holbrook nació en 1345, en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Sutton en 1400, en Averham with Kelham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1410, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
